scope: step 1~2.6 골격 + Phase 7 결정 A(c0252/c0204 INFUSION-STOP-RESTART→Q04 spec-change)·결정 B(terminal_routing INVALID). bundles·재배선(①) 제외.

provenance.terminal_routing: wired ROUTE c.postcond routing_decision의 process-terminal(INVALID) ∩ strands 측정 (결정 B)

nodes.label: Observation records 완성 가능? (P4: subject-level obs 부재 ≠ dataset INVALID)
Time policy not specified / ELAPSED anchor 모호
Dose-sample linkage 또는 row 유형 모호
nodes.trigger: A6 = AMBIGUOUS OR (A4 = INFUSION-STOP-RESTART AND policy 부재)

nodes.label: Multi-study ID conflict, harmonization rule 없음
nodes.trigger: A1 ∈ {MULTI-HOMO, MULTI-HETERO, MULTI-SITE} AND harmonization policy 부재

nodes.label: Dose source conflict / 복원 정책 없음
Analyte/CMT assignment policy 없음 (CMT 번호 부재)
Unit dictionary incomplete (molar↔mass MW 부재 포함)
nodes.trigger: unit annotation 누락 OR molar↔mass 변환에 MW 부재(P5)

nodes.label: ADDL/II vs actual dose conflict, resolution policy 없음
Data package incomplete
nodes.trigger: 필수 deliverable(ISS, data dictionary, visit window 등) 부재

nodes.label: Legacy flag undocumented
nodes.trigger: legacy marker column(예: OLD_DATA=1) 의미 미정의

nodes.label: Real-world adherence/administration unresolved
nodes.trigger: A2 = TDM-RWD AND dose sourced from patient recall only

nodes.label: catch-all unknown defect (강한 페널티)
nodes.trigger: Q01–Q15D 어디에도 매칭 안 되는 정체불명 결함

nodes.skeleton_hook: N4 (observation record completion) + A8 CMT policy
N3 (dose record completion) + A4 infusion states
N3 (dose record completion) + A4 ADDL-II states
N3 (dose record completion) + A4 ADDL-II states
N2 (time sequence construction) + A3 time derivation policy

spec_decisions.reason: fail_route_to=UNSUPPORTED/INVALID(terminal, Q 아님) + A10 실행 위치(front vs chain 끝) 결정 필요.
정규화 순서 상호작용의 tree 표현은 step2 bundle/설계 결정 대기.
